Package jline.lang

Class NodeParam

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.lang.NodeParam
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    public class NodeParam
extends Object
implements Serializable
    Class for the nodeparam field within NetworkStruct
